productDisplayName: Salvatore Ferragamo Women Incanto Bloom Perfume
description: Style NoteCreated by Sophie Labbe, Incanto Bloom by salvatore ferragamo comes in a slim, opalescent white, oval bottle dusted with delicate wisps of black and pink dandelion "blooms," and a diffuser topper that is a modern version of Ferragamo's bow, re-imagined in black and white plastic. The composition encompasses grapefruit blossom, freesia, tea rose, champaca, musk and cashmere. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
